title: LATAM Specialist Referral Network Gap
problem: Primary care to specialist referrals in LATAM are chaotic. No centralized directory of specialists. No visibility into specialist availability. Referrals sent via paper/fax, often lost. No tracking of referral completion. Patients wait months for specialist appointments with no communication. No feedback loop to referring physician.
solution: Specialist referral platform. Directory of vetted specialists with real-time availability. Electronic referral submission. Automated appointment booking. Patient tracking through referral journey. Feedback loop to PCP. Analytics on referral patterns and outcomes.
technology: Web platform, EMR integration, e-referral workflows, specialist directory, patient tracking, analytics
target_customer: Primary care practices, hospital systems, health insurers (network management), specialists
regulatory_notes: Medical referral regulations, data sharing between providers
varden_fit: HIGH FIT - Referral infrastructure is core to care coordination. B2B software connecting PCPs and specialists. Network effects once specialists onboard. Reduces referral leakage for insurers.
notes: BOREALING: Referral management is pure admin infrastructure. Boring but essential. Every referral is revenue for someone - control the flow.
